speaker: Audience Member 3
text: Framing the U.S. divide as conservative versus liberal is misleading because Trumpism isn't conservatism — it's demagoguery and populism — and the breakdown was driven as much by conservatives outsourcing jobs to China as by progressive social policy.
context: Audience pushback on the panel's recurring conservative-vs-liberal framing.

addressed_in_artifacts.voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
